description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated female figure, partially draped in cloth, with one arm extended and holding an indistinct object. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with smooth, naturalistic contours and detailed anatomical features. The woman sits on a rectangular plinth, her left leg bent and her right leg extended, creating a relaxed yet elegant pose. The surface of the sculpture has a matte, stone-like finish with subtle variations in color, suggesting it is made from terracotta or a similar material. The back of the figure is exposed, showing careful attention to musculature and form. The overall impression is one of calm contemplation, with the figure's gaze directed downward toward the object in her hand.
description: A classical-style seated female figure, partially draped, holding an object and resting on a rectangular plinth. The sculpture features smooth, naturalistic details and a matte, stone-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's face, torso, and the object in her right hand, with both legs visible and draped cloth over her lap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended right leg, the curve of her back, and the draped cloth, with the left arm resting on the plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the exposed back, the figure's head turned slightly, and the overall posture from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the full length of the extended right leg, the bent left leg, and the relaxed position of the left arm.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
